CPU: ID 0x206a7, Processor Type 0x0, Family 0x6, Model 0x2a, Stepping 0x7
Northbridge: 8086:0104 (2nd generation (Sandy Bridge family) Core Processor (Mobile))
Southbridge: 8086:1e56 (QS77)
IGD: 8086:0126 (Intel(R) HD 3000 Graphics)

============= GPIOS =============

GPIOBASE = 0x0500 (IO)

gpiobase+0x0000: 0xb942d9ff (GPIO_USE_SEL)
gpiobase+0x0000: 0xb96ba1ff (GPIO_USE_SEL) DEFAULT
gpiobase+0x0000: 0x00297800 (GPIO_USE_SEL) DIFF
gpiobase+0x0004: 0x06ffceff (GP_IO_SEL)
gpiobase+0x0004: 0xeeff6eff (GP_IO_SEL) DEFAULT
gpiobase+0x0004: 0xe800a000 (GP_IO_SEL) DIFF
gpiobase+0x0008: 0x00000000 (RESERVED)
gpiobase+0x000c: 0x60e3dfff (GP_LVL)
gpiobase+0x000c: 0x02fe0100 (GP_LVL) DEFAULT
gpiobase+0x000c: 0x621ddeff (GP_LVL) DIFF
gpiobase+0x0010: 0x00000000 (RESERVED)
gpiobase+0x0014: 0x00000000 (RESERVED)
gpiobase+0x0018: 0x00000000 (GPO_BLINK)
gpiobase+0x0018: 0x00040000 (GPO_BLINK) DEFAULT
gpiobase+0x0018: 0x00040000 (GPO_BLINK) DIFF
gpiobase+0x001c: 0x00000000 (GP_SER_BLINK)
gpiobase+0x0020: 0x00080000 (GP_SB_CMDSTS)
gpiobase+0x0024: 0x00000000 (GP_SB_DATA)
gpiobase+0x0028: 0x0000     (GPI_NMI_EN)
gpiobase+0x002a: 0x0000     (GPI_NMI_STS)
gpiobase+0x002c: 0x0000c08a (GPI_INV)
gpiobase+0x002c: 0x00000000 (GPI_INV) DEFAULT
gpiobase+0x002c: 0x0000c08a (GPI_INV) DIFF
gpiobase+0x0030: 0x12ff40e4 (GPIO_USE_SEL2)
gpiobase+0x0030: 0x020300fe (GPIO_USE_SEL2) DEFAULT
gpiobase+0x0030: 0x10fc401a (GPIO_USE_SEL2) DIFF

========== ACPI/PMC =========


========== ABASE/PMBASE =========

PMBASE = 0x0400 (IO)

pmbase+0x0000: 0x0001     (PM1_STS)
pmbase+0x0002: 0x0120     (PM1_EN)
pmbase+0x0004: 0x00000001 (PM1_CNT)
pmbase+0x0008: 0x00120513 (PM1_TMR)
pmbase+0x000c: 0x00000000 (RESERVED)
pmbase+0x0010: 0x00000000 (RESERVED)
pmbase+0x0014: 0x00000000 (RESERVED)
pmbase+0x0018: 0x00000000 (RESERVED)
pmbase+0x001c: 0x00000000 (RESERVED)
pmbase+0x0020: 0x0e750000 (GPE0_STS)
               0x00000008
pmbase+0x0028: 0x60080246 (GPE0_EN)
               0x00000000
pmbase+0x0030: 0x80022023 (SMI_EN)
pmbase+0x0034: 0x00004100 (SMI_STS)
pmbase+0x0038: 0x0000     (ALT_GP_SMI_EN)
pmbase+0x003a: 0x0e75     (ALT_GP_SMI_STS)
pmbase+0x003c: 0x00       (UPRWC)
pmbase+0x003d: 0x00       (RESERVED)
pmbase+0x003e: 0x0000     (RESERVED)
pmbase+0x0040: 0x0000     (RESERVED)
pmbase+0x0042: 0x00       (GPE_CNTL)
pmbase+0x0043: 0x00       (RESERVED)
pmbase+0x0044: 0x1360     (DEVACT_STS)
pmbase+0x0046: 0x0000     (RESERVED)
pmbase+0x0048: 0x00000000 (RESERVED)
pmbase+0x004c: 0x00000000 (RESERVED)
pmbase+0x0050: 0x00       (PM2_CNT)
pmbase+0x0051: 0x00       (RESERVED)
pmbase+0x0052: 0x0000     (RESERVED)
pmbase+0x0054: 0x00002000 (RESERVED)
pmbase+0x0058: 0x00000000 (RESERVED)
pmbase+0x005c: 0x0000     (ALT_GPI_SMI_EN2)
pmbase+0x005e: 0x0000     (ALT_GPI_SMI_STS2)
pmbase+0x0060: 0x0004     (TCO_RLD)
pmbase+0x0062: 0x00       (TCO_DAT_IN)
pmbase+0x0063: 0x00       (TCO_DAT_OUT)
pmbase+0x0064: 0x0000     (TCO1_STS)
pmbase+0x0066: 0x0000     (TCO2_STS)
pmbase+0x0068: 0x0800     (TCO1_CNT)
pmbase+0x006a: 0x0008     (TCO2_CNT)
pmbase+0x006c: 0x0000     (TCO_MESSAGE)
pmbase+0x006e: 0x00       (TCO_WDCNT)
pmbase+0x006f: 0x00       (RESERVED)
pmbase+0x0070: 0x03       (SW_IRQ_GEN)
pmbase+0x0071: 0x00       (RESERVED)
pmbase+0x0072: 0x0032     (TCO_TMR)
pmbase+0x0074: 0x00000000 (RESERVED)
pmbase+0x0078: 0x00000000 (RESERVED)
pmbase+0x007c: 0x00000000 (RESERVED)



========== LPC/eSPI =========

Error: Dumping LPC/eSPI on this southbridge is not (yet) supported.

.tRCD = 11 /* 11 clocks = 13.750 ns */,
.tXPDLL = 20 /* 20 clocks = 25.000 ns */,
.tXP = 5 /* 5 clocks = 6.250 ns */,
.tAONPD = 8 /* 8 clocks = 10.000 ns */,
.tREFI = 6240 /* 6240 clocks = 7800.000 ns */,
.tRFC = 280 /* 280 clocks = 350.000 ns */,
.tMOD = 12 /* 12 clocks = 15.000 ns */,
.tXSOffset = 8 /* 8 clocks = 10.000 ns */,
.reg5064b0 = 0xf0,
/* mismatch 0x330f0000, 0x73.  */
.channel_size_mb = { ?, 0 },
/* CH0S0: 8192 MiB  */

/* CH0S0  */

============= EPBAR =============

0x0000: 0x04010002
0x0004: 0x00000001
0x0010: 0x00000001
0x0014: 0x80000001
0x001c: 0x00008001
0x0020: 0x81000002
0x0040: 0x00010005

0x0050: 0x01010001
0x0058: 0xfed18000

0x0070: 0x03000002
0x0080: 0x04000002
0x0090: 0x05000002



============= DMIBAR ============

DMIBAR = 0xfed18000 (MEM)

dmibase+0x0000: 0x04010002 (DMI VCECH)
dmibase+0x0004: 0x00000001 (DMI PVCCAP1)
dmibase+0x0008: 0x00000000 (DMI PVVAP2)
dmibase+0x000c: 0x0000     (DMI PVCCTL)
dmibase+0x0010: 0x00000001 (DMI VC0RCAP)
dmibase+0x0014: 0x80000019 (DMI VC0RCTL)
dmibase+0x001a: 0x0000     (DMI VC0RSTS)
dmibase+0x001c: 0x00008001 (DMI VC1RCAP)
dmibase+0x0020: 0x81000022 (DMI VC1RCTL)
dmibase+0x0026: 0x0000     (DMI VC1RSTS)
dmibase+0x0028: 0x00000001 (DMI VCPRCAP)
dmibase+0x002c: 0x82000044 (DMI VCPRCTL)
dmibase+0x0032: 0x0000     (DMI VCPRSTS)
dmibase+0x0034: 0x00008000 (DMI VCMRCAP)
dmibase+0x0038: 0x87000080 (DMI VCMRCTL)
dmibase+0x003e: 0x0000     (DMI VCMRSTS)
dmibase+0x0044: 0x01010202 (DMI ESC)
dmibase+0x0050: 0x00020001 (DMI LE1D)
dmibase+0x0058: 0xfed1c000 (DMI LE1A)
dmibase+0x005c: 0x00000000 (DMI LUE1A)
dmibase+0x0060: 0x00010001 (DMI LE2D)
dmibase+0x0068: 0xfed19000 (DMI LE2A)
dmibase+0x0084: 0x00012c42 (LCAP)
dmibase+0x0088: 0x0003     (LCTL)
dmibase+0x008a: 0x0042     (LSTS)
dmibase+0x0098: 0x0002     (LCTL2)
dmibase+0x009a: 0x0000     (LSTS2)
dmibase+0x0bc0: 0xe978861c (AFE_BMUF0)
dmibase+0x0bc4: 0x0001505b (RSVD)
dmibase+0x0bc8: 0x00375af6 (RSVD)
dmibase+0x0bcc: 0x01100000 (AFE_BMUT0)


========= PCIEXBAR ========

PCIEXBAR: 0xf8000000

PCIe 00:14.0 extended config space:
0000: 86 80 31 1e 06 04 90 02 04 30 03 0c 00 00 00 00
0010: 04 00 d0 f7 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00
0020: 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 86 80 31 1e
0030: 00 00 00 00 70 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 0b 01 00 00
0040: fd 07 0e 80 39 c2 03 80 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00
0050: 17 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00
0060: 30 20 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00
0070: 01 80 c2 c1 08 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00
0080: 05 00 87 00 00 00 e0 fe 00 00 00 00 20 00 00 00
0090: 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00
00a0: 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00
00b0: 8f 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00
00c0: 03 0c 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00
00d0: 0f 00 00 00 0f 00 00 00 0f 00 00 00 0f 00 00 00
00e0: 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00
00f0: 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 87 0f 05 08 00 00 00 00
0100: 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00
0110: 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00
0120: 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00
0130: 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00

Error: Dumping MSRs on this CPU (0x0206a0) is not (yet) supported.



============= AMBs ============

Error: Dumping AMBs on this MCH is not (yet) supported.

============= SPI / BIOS CNTL =============

BIOS_CNTL = 0x0008 (IO)

0x0000 = BIOSWE - write enable
0x0000 = BLE - lock enable
0x0002 = SPI Read configuration
0x0000 = TopSwapStatus
0x0000 = SMM BIOS Write Protect Disable
0x0000 = reserved

============= SPI Bar ==============

0x07ff0580 = BFPR - BIOS Flash primary region
0x0000c008 = HSFSTS - Hardware Sequencing Flash Status
0x00000000 = HSFCTL - Hardware Sequencing Flash Control
0x0058400a = FADDR - Flash Address
0x00000000 = Reserved
0x74524152 = FDATA0
0x0000ffff = FRACC - Flash Region Access Permissions
0x00000000 = Flash Region 0
0x07ff0580 = Flash Region 1
0x057f0001 = Flash Region 2
0x00001fff = Flash Region 3
0x00001fff = Flash Region 4
0x00000000 = FPR0 Flash Protected Range 0
0x00000000 = FPR0 Flash Protected Range 1
0x00000000 = FPR0 Flash Protected Range 2
0x00000000 = FPR0 Flash Protected Range 3
0x00000000 = FPR0 Flash Protected Range 4
0x00000080 = SSFSTS - Software Sequencing Flash Status
0x00000006 = PREOP - Prefix opcode Configuration
0x0000043b = OPTYPE - Opcode Type Configuration
0x0000019f05200302 = OPMENU - Opcode Menu Configuration
0x00000000 = BBAR - BIOS Base Address Configuration
0x00001000 = FDOC - Flash Descriptor Observability Control
0x00000000 = Reserved
0x00000007 = AFC - Additional Flash Control
0x00802005 = LVSCC - Host Lower Vendor Specific Component Capabilities
0x00002005 = UVSCC - Host Upper Vendor Specific Component Capabilities
0x00000000 = FPB - Flash Partition Boundary

============= AHCI Registers ==============


============= AHCI Configuration Registers ==============


============= SATA Initialization Registers ==============


============= ABAR ==============

ABAR = 0xf7d10000 (MEM)

Generic Host Control Registers:
0x000: 0xc730ff45 (CAP)
0x004: 0x80000002 (GHC)
0x008: 0x00000000 (IS)
0x00c: 0x00000002 (PI)
0x010: 0x00010300 (VS)
0x014: 0x00000000 (CCC_CTL)
0x018: 0x00000000 (CCC_PORTS)
0x01c: 0x01600002 (EM_LOC)
0x020: 0x07010000 (EM_CTL)
0x024: 0x00000004 (CAP2)
0x028: 0x00000000 (BOHC)
0x0a0: 0x00000058 (Reserved)
0x0c0: 0x00311e03 (Reserved)
0x0c8: 0x000000c0 (Reserved)

Port 1 Control Registers:
0x180: 0x2ae80000 (PxCLB)
0x184: 0x00000001 (PxCLBU)
0x188: 0x2ae80400 (PxFB)
0x18c: 0x00000001 (PxFBU)
0x190: 0x00000000 (PxIS)
0x194: 0x7800007f (PxIE)
0x198: 0x0000c717 (PxCMD)
0x19c: 0x00000000 (Reserved)
0x1a0: 0x00000050 (PxTFD)
0x1a4: 0x00000101 (PxSIG)
0x1a8: 0x00000133 (PxSSTS)
0x1ac: 0x00000400 (PxSCTL)
0x1b0: 0x00000000 (PxSERR)
0x1b4: 0x00000000 (PxSACT)
0x1b8: 0x00000000 (PxCI)
0x1bc: 0x00000000 (PxSNTF)
0x1c0: 0x00000000 (PxFBS)
0x1c4: 0x00000000 (PxDEVSLP)
0x1c8: 0x00000000 (Reserved)

Other registers:

------------- CPU 0 ----------------
SGX supported             : NO
